falsification_rule_text: Not supported if, across the four cases: (a) FIRST-ORDER state- control-index rise is confirmed (acknowledged success) AND (b) production and capex DO NOT decline relative to synthetic control at p<0.10 in at least 3/4 cases AND (c) fiscal contribution DOES NOT fall in at least 2/4 cases. A first-order success with stable second/third-order outputs (Statoil-like disciplined SOE governance) would refute the chain claim for the Latin-American cases; the cases are a bundle and the test asks whether the chain holds in MOST of them.

variables_missing.name: state_control_index
variables_missing.source: constructed: share of sector assets state-owned + board political-appointment share + procurement bypass frequency; coded per case

variables_missing.name: sector_capex_to_output_ratio
variables_missing.source: company annual reports + SEC filings (VEN PDVSA via bond prospectus filings); pemex:investment_plan; enap:memoria_anual; ypf:reports

variables_missing.name: expertise_emigration_proxy
variables_missing.source: constructed: petroleum-engineer and senior-technician emigration from source country to Colombian, US, Canadian, Saudi upstream firms; LinkedIn-based panel + SPE membership transfers

variables_missing.name: sector_productivity_real_output_per_worker
variables_missing.source: constructed: sector output / sector employment from company reports

variables_missing.name: nationalisation_or_control_intensification_event
variables_missing.source: constructed: event indicators per case (VEN 2003 PDVSA purge post-tanquerazo; VEN 2007 expropriation wave; MEX 2013 reform reversed / 2018 AMLO Pemex re-prioritisation; CHL ENAP historical + 2014-2022 governance shifts; ARG 2012 YPF renationalisation)
